creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Seems to have slip through the cracks, sorry :/

* Patch fails to apply
* Please tag upstream properly or follow Porters Handbook on how to adress "in-between" releases
* If the above isn't possible follow either example 15 or 18 in Porters Handbook
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#makefile-master_sites-github (also applies to Gitlab)

What is USE_HARDENING? As far as I can tell it doesn't seem to used in the tree?

Best regards,
Daniel
